name: Google Sheets
tagline: Live sync leads from any Google Sheet into Leadkaun every 5 minutes.
description:
Most Indian SMBs capture leads in Google Sheets — from ad agencies, website forms, or manual entry. Leadkaun's Google Sheets connector polls your sheet every 5 minutes and brings in new rows as leads, auto-graded A–F on arrival.

No code. No Zapier. Share the sheet with the Leadkaun service account, paste the URL, map columns, done in under 10 minutes.

setupSteps.heading: Share the sheet with the Leadkaun service account
setupSteps.body: Copy the Leadkaun service-account email from Settings → Integrations. Share your sheet with Viewer permission.

setupSteps.heading: Paste sheet URL into Leadkaun
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Google Sheets → Add sheet. Leadkaun auto-detects column headers.

setupSteps.heading: Map columns and confirm
setupSteps.body: Drag each sheet column to its Leadkaun field (name, phone, email, source, inquiry). Leadkaun pre-fills obvious matches.

setupSteps.heading: Test with a dummy row
setupSteps.body: Add a test row. Within 5 minutes it appears as a graded lead in your Priority Queue.

useCases: Ad-agency lead dumps arriving weekly as Google Sheets
Facebook Lead Ads export-to-sheet → Leadkaun pipeline
Walk-in/manual enquiry logging when the rep is on the phone

faqs.a: No. Any free Google account with a shared sheet works.
Yes. Each sheet maps to a separate source tag.
No. Leadkaun reads only. Deleting rows from the sheet does not remove leads from Leadkaun.

name: CSV Upload
tagline: Drag-drop 10,000 leads into Leadkaun. Import finishes in under 60 seconds.
description: For one-time bulk imports (agency lead lists, ad-platform exports, legacy CRM migrations), CSV upload is the fastest path in. Leadkaun streams the file through Supabase Storage + Inngest batch workers (BATCH_SIZE=500), handling 10,000 rows in under 60 seconds.

setupSteps.heading: Prepare your CSV
setupSteps.body: Required columns: name, phone. Recommended: email, source, date-added, company, inquiry. First row is headers.

setupSteps.heading: Clean phone numbers
setupSteps.body: Indian formats vary (+91, leading 0, spaces). Leadkaun normalises automatically, but pre-cleaning drops 5–10% false duplicates.

setupSteps.heading: Upload via Leadkaun UI
setupSteps.body: Settings → Import → CSV → drag and drop. Leadkaun previews the first 10 rows for mapping confirmation.

setupSteps.heading: Review the Import Insight Screen
setupSteps.body: Post-upload, Leadkaun shows grade distribution, source breakdown, and junk rate. If 60% are Grade F, the source has a data-quality problem.

useCases: Legacy Excel trackers consolidated into one system

faqs.a: Up to 50 MB. Split into 10k-row chunks if larger.
Yes — phone normalisation + fuzzy match on name. Existing leads get merged with new source tag logged.
Bulk-delete from the lead list with a date-added filter.

name: WhatsApp (Manual Logging)
tagline: Track every WhatsApp conversation in 3 taps — works with any WhatsApp account, no API required.
description:
70% of Indian B2B first-contact happens on WhatsApp. Instead of requiring the WhatsApp Business API (which most SMBs don't have), Leadkaun uses 3-tap manual logging: rep reads the WhatsApp reply, taps stage + intent + outcome in Leadkaun, done in 10 seconds.

This is deliberate India-first design — every team can track WhatsApp without the BSP stack.

setupSteps.heading: No setup needed
setupSteps.body: 3-tap logging is built into every lead record out of the box.

setupSteps.heading: Train reps on the 3 taps
setupSteps.body: Stage: first-reply / asking-questions / objection / meeting-booked / ghosted. Intent: high / medium / low / negative. Outcome: progressed / stuck / closed.

setupSteps.heading: Use after every meaningful exchange
setupSteps.body: Don't log every 'hi'. Log when something meaningful happened. Feeds Intent Score +10 (high), +5 (medium), 0 (low), −10 (negative).

useCases: Real estate site-visit coordination on WhatsApp
EdTech parent follow-ups across 80% of the admissions conversation
Insurance renewal reminders and objection handling

faqs.a: No. Leadkaun never accesses WhatsApp directly. Rep summarises each exchange in 3 taps.
Partner integrations with Gupshup / AiSensy / Interakt on roadmap — auto-logging via BSP.

faqs.q: Can a manager see the logs?
faqs.a: Yes — per-rep WhatsApp activity shows on the Rep Performance card. Aggregate only; no message content.

name: Gupshup
tagline: Auto-log every WhatsApp Business API message as a Leadkaun signal.
description: Gupshup is India's largest WhatsApp Business Service Provider. For teams already on WhatsApp Business API through Gupshup, Leadkaun integrates via webhook to auto-log inbound and outbound messages — feeding Intent Score without rep taps.

setupSteps.heading: Obtain Gupshup API credentials
setupSteps.body: Log in to your Gupshup dashboard, navigate to API credentials, copy the App ID and API key.

setupSteps.heading: Configure webhook in Gupshup
setupSteps.body: Paste the Leadkaun webhook URL (Settings → Integrations → Gupshup) into Gupshup's webhook configuration.

setupSteps.heading: Map templates to intent signals
setupSteps.body: In Leadkaun, map each Gupshup message template to an intent-score rule (first-reply template = +5, pricing-template = +10).

useCases: Teams running WhatsApp outbound campaigns on Gupshup
BFSI teams needing auditable WhatsApp logs for compliance
EdTech chains with high-volume parent conversations

faqs.q: Does Leadkaun send messages via Gupshup?
faqs.a: Read-only in Phase 1. Leadkaun logs Gupshup messages as signals. Outbound via Leadkaun on roadmap.
Gupshup handles those separately. Leadkaun adds no per-message charge.

name: AiSensy
tagline: WhatsApp Business Platform integration — auto-log AiSensy-sent and received messages into Leadkaun.
description: AiSensy is a WhatsApp Business Platform focused on SMBs. Leadkaun's webhook integration captures every message your team sends or receives through AiSensy as a signal — stage, intent, outcome derived from message content and template tags.

setupSteps.heading: Install AiSensy webhook
setupSteps.body: In AiSensy dashboard → Webhooks → add Leadkaun's webhook URL from Settings → Integrations → AiSensy.

setupSteps.heading: Tag templates with intent signals
setupSteps.body: Map each AiSensy template to a Leadkaun intent rule.

setupSteps.heading: Test with a live conversation
setupSteps.body: Send a test WhatsApp via AiSensy; within 30 seconds the message appears on the lead record in Leadkaun.

useCases: SMB teams outbound via AiSensy broadcasting

faqs.q: Do I need a separate AiSensy plan?
faqs.a: Yes — AiSensy is a separate subscription. Leadkaun adds signal capture on top.

name: Interakt
tagline: Interakt WhatsApp Business API integration — auto-sync conversations as Leadkaun intent signals.
description: Interakt is a WhatsApp Business Platform favoured by Indian D2C brands and mid-market teams. Leadkaun's webhook integration mirrors every Interakt conversation into the relevant lead record.

setupSteps.heading: Configure webhook in Interakt
setupSteps.body: Interakt dashboard → Settings → Webhooks → add Leadkaun's webhook URL.

setupSteps.heading: Match contacts to Leadkaun leads
setupSteps.body: Leadkaun matches by phone number automatically.

useCases: B2B teams with mixed rep + automated outreach

faqs.a: Not in Phase 1. Signal capture only.

name: Gmail
tagline: Sync Gmail threads to Leadkaun lead records — email becomes an intent signal alongside calls and WhatsApp.
description: For teams running B2B email outbound, Gmail integration links every thread to the matching Leadkaun lead. A rep's email open, reply, or meeting-booking increments the Intent Score automatically.

setupSteps.heading: Connect Gmail account
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Gmail → Connect. OAuth consent prompts the standard Google flow.

setupSteps.heading: Enable per-lead thread linking
setupSteps.body: Leadkaun matches by sender/recipient email; unmatched emails stay in Gmail only.

setupSteps.heading: Map signal rules
setupSteps.body: Email open = +1 Intent. Reply = +10. Meeting booked (calendar) = +25.

useCases: Outbound BD teams working mid-market and enterprise
Account managers handling post-sale expansion conversations

faqs.a: Phase 1 is read-only. Outbound send-via-Leadkaun on roadmap.
Last 30 days on first connect; ongoing after that.

name: Resend
tagline: Transactional email delivery for Morning Brief, alerts, and notifications.
description: Leadkaun uses Resend for all outbound email — the daily Morning Brief at 8:30 AM IST, SQL-crossing alerts, weekly digests. Resend's React Email templates keep the design consistent and the deliverability clean.

setupSteps.heading: Set up your Resend account
setupSteps.body: Sign up at resend.com, verify your sending domain (adds DNS records).

setupSteps.heading: Paste API key into Leadkaun
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Resend → paste API key.

setupSteps.heading: Customise sender address
setupSteps.body: Default sender: notifications@[your-domain]. Managers can override per rule.

faqs.q: Do I need a Resend account?
faqs.a: Leadkaun handles Resend for you on Growth+ tiers. BYO Resend is also supported.

name: Google Calendar
tagline: Sync booked meetings as Intent signals; log meeting outcomes in 3 taps.
description: A booked meeting is the strongest non-purchase intent signal. Google Calendar integration auto-logs every meeting with a Leadkaun-tracked lead as +25 Intent. After the meeting, rep taps outcome (progressed / stuck / closed) in 10 seconds.

setupSteps.heading: Connect Google Calendar
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Google Calendar → Connect. OAuth standard flow.

setupSteps.heading: Map calendar email to Leadkaun user
setupSteps.body: Auto-matched; override if rep uses separate email.

setupSteps.heading: Test with a dummy meeting
setupSteps.body: Book a meeting with a tracked lead's email. Within 30 seconds the lead gets +25 Intent.

useCases: Sales demos booked via Calendly or direct calendar
Site visits in real estate / dealer visits in manufacturing

faqs.a: Only meetings where a tracked lead is a participant.
Outlook integration on roadmap.

name: Calendly
tagline: Every Calendly booking auto-creates or updates a lead with +25 Intent.
description: Calendly is the standard demo-booking tool. Leadkaun's webhook integration fires on every Calendly booking — creates the lead if new, or adds +25 Intent if existing. Rep gets an instant notification to prep.

setupSteps.heading: Copy Leadkaun webhook URL
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Calendly → copy webhook URL.

setupSteps.heading: Configure Calendly webhook
setupSteps.body: Calendly → Integrations → Webhooks → paste URL, enable 'Invitee Created' event.

setupSteps.heading: Test with a booking
setupSteps.body: Book a test meeting via Calendly; within 10 seconds a new lead appears in Leadkaun with source = 'calendly'.

useCases: Inbound demo requests from pricing page

faqs.q: Does it cancel lead if booking is cancelled?
faqs.a: No — cancellation logs as a 'stage: cancelled' signal with −10 Intent.

name: Razorpay
tagline: Payment-completion signals on proposals and deals — a paid invoice is the clearest 'won' signal.
description: For teams selling via Razorpay payment links or invoices, integration auto-marks a lead as 'closed-won' when the invoice is paid. Conversion data flows to the Source Truth card automatically.

setupSteps.heading: Paste Razorpay webhook URL into Razorpay
setupSteps.body: Razorpay dashboard → Settings → Webhooks → Leadkaun's webhook URL.

setupSteps.heading: Enable payment.captured event
setupSteps.body: Select 'payment.captured' as the event type.

setupSteps.heading: Map Razorpay customer to lead
setupSteps.body: Match by email or phone; unmatched payments log as manual review.

useCases: SMB SaaS closing deals via Razorpay links

faqs.a: Partial payments log as 'deposit received' signal; full payment marks 'closed-won'.

name: Zapier
tagline: Connect Leadkaun to 5,000+ apps via Zapier — for the long tail of integrations we don't support natively.
description: Zapier integration is the universal escape hatch. If a tool isn't in Leadkaun's native list, chances are Zapier connects it. Triggers: lead created, grade changed, signal logged, deal won. Actions: create lead, update lead, log signal.

setupSteps.heading: Enable Zapier integration
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Zapier → Connect.

setupSteps.heading: Create a Zap
setupSteps.body: In Zapier: pick Leadkaun as trigger or action; authenticate; build the flow.

setupSteps.heading: Test end-to-end
setupSteps.body: Use Zapier's test-run feature to verify the flow works with a dummy lead.

useCases: Syncing leads from Typeform, JotForm, or other form builders

faqs.a: Zapier-standard; 30 tasks/min on free tier, 100/min on paid.

name: IndiaMART
tagline: Import industrial B2B enquiries from IndiaMART directly — the dominant B2B lead source for Indian manufacturers.
description: For B2B manufacturers, IndiaMART is the #1 lead source. Leadkaun supports two paths: (1) IndiaMART export → Google Sheet → Leadkaun pulls automatically; (2) direct IndiaMART API integration on roadmap for Growth+ tiers.

setupSteps.heading: Export from IndiaMART
setupSteps.body: IndiaMART seller dashboard → Leads → Export CSV weekly, or set up auto-export to Google Sheets.

setupSteps.heading: Link to Leadkaun Google Sheets connector
setupSteps.body: Point Leadkaun at the exported sheet; 5-minute polling brings in new enquiries as graded leads.

faqs.a: On roadmap — Phase 2 partner integration.

name: Facebook Lead Ads
tagline: Auto-pipe Facebook Lead Ads form submissions into Leadkaun as graded leads.
description: Facebook Lead Ads are one of the top paid lead sources for Indian B2B SMBs. Leadkaun ingests submissions via webhook or via Facebook's auto-export to Google Sheets, whichever path your team uses.

setupSteps.heading: Option A — Google Sheets path
setupSteps.body: Configure Facebook Lead Ads to auto-export leads to a Google Sheet. Connect the sheet to Leadkaun (5-min polling).

setupSteps.heading: Option B — Direct webhook (roadmap)
setupSteps.body: Direct Facebook Lead Ads webhook integration on roadmap for Growth+ tiers.

faqs.a: Cost-per-lead tracked when Facebook Ads cost data is uploaded; Source Truth card shows ₹ cost vs ₹ won per campaign.

name: Google Ads
tagline: Track Google Ads lead conversions with cost attribution — the Source Truth card shows ₹ won per campaign.
description: Google Ads campaigns drop leads into your forms, which flow to Leadkaun. Once cost data is synced (manual weekly upload or Google Ads API on roadmap), the Source Truth card shows ₹ won ÷ ₹ spent per campaign. Kill bad campaigns fast.

setupSteps.heading: Connect Google Ads account
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Google Ads → OAuth flow (roadmap).

setupSteps.heading: Manual path: weekly cost upload
setupSteps.body: Export Google Ads campaign costs weekly to CSV; Leadkaun ingests and maps to Source Truth.

faqs.q: Do I need a Google Ads Manager account?
faqs.a: Standard account works. Manager accounts supported for agencies.

name: Generic Webhook
tagline: POST to Leadkaun's webhook URL to create or update leads from any source.
description: If you have a custom system — internal CRM, proprietary form builder, legacy database — the generic webhook is your path in. Every Leadkaun account has a unique webhook URL; POST JSON with standard fields, and leads flow in graded A–F.

setupSteps.heading: Copy webhook URL
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Webhook → copy the unique URL (includes account-specific token).

setupSteps.heading: POST JSON payload
setupSteps.body: Required fields: name, phone. Recommended: email, source, company, inquiry. Content-Type: application/json.

setupSteps.heading: Verify with a test payload
setupSteps.body: curl -X POST <url> -d '{"name":"Test","phone":"+919999999999","source":"api"}'. Lead appears in Leadkaun in under 5 seconds.

faqs.a: 100 requests/second per account. Contact support for higher limits.
Include an 'external_id' field — Leadkaun dedupes on it.

name: Slack
tagline: Post Leadkaun alerts (SQL crossed, ₹ at risk, grade drops) into a Slack channel.
description: Managers who live in Slack want alerts there, not just in email. Leadkaun's Slack integration posts SQL crossings, grade drops, and daily Morning Brief summaries into a configured channel.

setupSteps.heading: Install Slack app
setupSteps.body: Settings → Integrations → Slack → Install to workspace (OAuth).

setupSteps.heading: Pick a target channel
setupSteps.body: Choose which channel gets alerts (e.g. #sales-alerts).

setupSteps.heading: Configure alert types
setupSteps.body: Opt in/out of: SQL crossings, grade drops, Morning Brief summary, Missed Opportunity roundups.

useCases: Agencies with client channels needing lead alerts

faqs.a: Yes — configure per-rep DM instead of channel post.
